title: GitHub App Creation Authority

authorized_creator.scope: May create a GitHub App only after mandatory approvals and creation evidence are complete.
limitations: May not create credentials before credential authority is approved.
May not activate repository mutation capability through app creation alone.

approval_authority.scope: Approve GitHub App creation authority and initial non-production app metadata.

review_authority.scope: Review business justification, risk assessment, permission manifest, scope, rollback plan, and audit readiness.

revocation_authority.scope: May require immediate GitHub App disablement, installation removal, credential revocation, or connector blocking on governance failure or incident evidence.

emergency_authority.scope: May initiate emergency disablement or revocation to prevent harm.
limitations: Emergency authority may block or revoke but may not approve new production activation.
Emergency action must generate audit evidence and post-incident review.

audit_authority.scope: Owns audit evidence requirements, evidence review, export readiness, and fail-closed determinations for creation authority.

required_approvals.approval_expiration: 14 days after approval or immediately on scope change, permission change, repository scope change, credential incident, or policy revision.
approval_revocation_process: Block GitHub App creation if not yet created.
If created, disable app onboarding and revoke any pending credential authority.

constraints: No credential material may be committed to repository.
Credential generation does not authorize production connector activation.
Credential authority must include rotation and revocation evidence.

storage_requirements: Store private key and webhook secret outside repository.
Use approved secret manager or protected deployment secret store with audit access.
Store only secret reference hashes in repository evidence.
encryption_requirements: Restrict decryption to approved runtime identity and secret custodians.
backup_requirements: Backup secret reference metadata only in repository evidence.
Backup secret material only inside approved secret storage controls.
Backup recovery must not expose raw secrets in logs or reports.
access_logging_requirements: Log actor identity or runtime identity reference.
incident_response_requirements: Revoke affected credential or app installation.
Rotate private key or webhook secret.
Verify no active token remains trusted.
Require post-incident governance review before reactivation.

acceptance_answers.can_github_app_creation_be_approved: Yes, GitHub App creation can be approved only as non-production onboarding authority and only after mandatory approval and evidence requirements are complete.
under_what_conditions: Two mandatory approvals exist from USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23.
Repository and installation scope are defined.
Secret governance and credential authority are defined.

generated_pr_metadata.commit_title: PB-045 VERIFIED: GitHub App Creation Authority
generated_pr_metadata.pr_title: PB-045 VERIFIED: GitHub App Creation Authority

generated_pr_body:
## PURPOSE
PB-045 defines the governance authority required before any GitHub App may be created for USBAY.

## RISK
GitHub App creation can establish future automation authority over repositories. If creation authority, approvals, evidence, secret governance, and activation boundaries are unclear, USBAY could create a path to ungoverned repository mutation.

## POLICY LINK
AGENTS.md fail-closed, audit-first engineering, human oversight, branch governance, network governance, and secret/data hygiene rules. PB-042 GitHub production connector design, PB-043 onboarding plan, and PB-044 onboarding readiness execution.

## REQUIRED APPROVALS
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 approvals are mandatory before GitHub App creation. Creation does not authorize production activation, credentials, API calls, or repository mutation.

## GOVERNANCE CHECKS
JSON evidence must parse. Authority model must define creator, approval, review, revocation, emergency, and audit authority. Required approvals, creation evidence, credential authority, secret governance, fail-closed conditions, production activation boundary, metadata, and required PR sections must be present.

## AUDIT
PB-045 generates governance/evidence/pb045/github_app_creation_authority.json and governance/evidence/pb045/github_app_creation_authority_summary.md with authority assignments, approval evidence requirements, credential authority, secret governance, fail-closed conditions, and activation boundaries.

## IMPACT
USBAY can approve GitHub App creation only under strict controls while preserving fail-closed separation between app creation and production connector activation.

## Decision
VERIFIED

## Status
READY_FOR_REVIEW
